name: Rintarou Okabe
description:
__Height:__ 177 cm (5'10")

Okabe Rintarou is a first-year student attending Tokyo Denki University and calls himself a Crazy Mad Scientist. He acts like a villain​ but is rather immature as he frequently shows traits of Chuunibyou syndrome despite being a grown-up man. After enrolling in university, he established a laboratory in Akihabara named the "Future Gadget Research Establishment", where he invents gadgets which tend to be of little use. He often speaks to himself on his cellphone, often not making any sense. Supposedly, he has very few friends that can understand what he's talking about.

The phrase he uses to end conversations, particularly with himself, is "El Psy Kongroo" (エル・プサイ・コングルゥ).

Steins;Gate:
~!Eventually, he falls in love with, and confesses to, Makise Kurisu.!~

Steins;Gate 0:
~!In the future of the Alpha world line, Okabe became the leader of the resistance against SERN's rule, and was known as an international terrorist (in the side story "The Distant Valhalla", it's revealed that SERN released Okabe and Daru so that they could found the resistance, thus completing the cycle of fate). Okabe got captured by SERN's Rounder unit in 2025 and was tortured to death.!~
